title: Dekton 9" Roller And Tray Multipack 4 Sleeves-Woven roller for emulsion|Ideal for emulsion paints on walls and ceilings| Medium Pile Woven Fabric Sleeves| Durable Finish| Seamless Repairs|Roller,Tray
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Ideal for Emulsion Paints: This 4" emulsion set is designed specifically for use with emulsion paints, making it perfect for applying paint to walls and ceilings. The set ensures smooth, even coverage with a professional finish every time without ,making any scratches on surfaces.

Medium Pile Woven Fabric Sleeves: Included are medium pile woven fabric sleeves that are perfect for various general-purpose touch-up tasks. These fabric sleeves offer excellent paint pickup and release, making them ideal for achieving a consistent and high-quality finish on different surfaces.

Durable Finish and Seamless Repairs: The durable material ensures that the paint goes on evenly and lasts longer, giving your surfaces a pristine look. The rollers in this set are excellent for making seamless repairs on nicks and scuffs, providing a uniform appearance that blends effortlessly with the rest of the painted surface.

Complete Painting Kit: The set includes 9"roller ,Tray Multipack 4 Sleeves, offering everything you need for a complete painting job. The rollers are designed for ease of use with the included frame, and the tray makes paint application and cleanup simple and efficient.

User-Friendly Design: The ergonomic roller frame ensures comfortable handling and efficient application, while the included tray makes loading paint and varnish a breeze. Designed with ease of use in mind, this set enhances your painting experience, making it ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
description: Introducing the Dekton 9" Roller and Tray Multipack—your ultimate solution for achieving a flawless finish with emulsion paints on walls and ceilings. This multipack includes four high-quality woven roller sleeves, a sturdy tray, and a reliable frame, designed to deliver professional-grade results. Crafted from medium pile woven fabric, these roller sleeves are engineered to handle emulsion paints with ease. The fabric’s texture ensures even paint application, minimizing streaks and maximizing coverage. Ideal for smooth to semi-rough surfaces, these sleeves provide a durable finish that enhances the appearance of any room. The medium pile of the roller sleeves is perfect for a variety of emulsion paints, making them versatile for different painting projects. Achieve seamless repairs with minimal effort. The woven fabric design of the sleeves helps in blending touch-ups and patches into existing paintwork, ensuring a consistent and professional look. The result is a smooth, durable finish that stands up to everyday wear and tear. This multipack includes a 9" roller, tray, and frame, offering a comprehensive painting solution in one package. The tray is designed for easy loading and unloading of paint, while the frame provides a secure fit for the roller, allowing for efficient and comfortable painting. The roller and tray are designed with user convenience in mind. The roller’s ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip, while the tray’s size is perfect for handling the right amount of paint, reducing spills and mess.
